title.en: HATS; HEAD COVERINGS (headbands A41D20/00; head-scarves A41D23/00)
Hats; Caps; Hoods
External devices or supports adapted to retain the shape of hats, caps or hoods (for changing the size A42C3/00)
Decorative arrangements or effects
convertible or adaptable for uses other than as headgear
with means for heating or cooling (ventilating arrangements for head coverings A42C5/04)
with means for light reflection
Arrangements for deodorising or perfuming
Sanitary or disposable, e.g. for use in hospitals or food industry
specially adapted for protection against insects
specially adapted for promoting health, e.g. with means for pressing on acupuncture points
with means for protecting the eyes, ears or nape, e.g. sun or rain shields; with air-inflated pads or removable linings
characterised by their material

Soft caps; Hoods
Straw hats; Substitutes therefor
Millinery
Coverings for protecting hats, caps or hoods against dust, rain, or sunshine
Collapsible or foldable
Inflatable
made of separable parts
Transformable, convertible or reversible hats (for uses other than as headgear A42B1/006)
made from a flat sheet
adjustable in size {; Form-fitting or self adjusting head coverings; Devices for reducing hat size}
with means for attaching articles thereto, e.g. memorandum tablets or mirrors
